item.title: Gorgeous, gorgeous, gorgeous.
item.description:
Gorgeous, gorgeous, gorgeous.

@petrafcollins answers questions from @oliviarodrigo and more in our latest i-D Asks. Watch the full video now at the link in bio.

Photography by @petrafcollins @annaballins
Written by @thomthomclub
Fashion Director: @clare_byrne
Video Director: @brooketjames
DP: @raybee8
Video Editor: @sarahloukiernan
Hair: @evaniefrausto
Makeup: @alisa_yasuda
Set Design: @niamhannigan
Production: @perfectprojects_
item.author: petrafcollins

item.author: petrafcollins

item.title: @petrafcollins’ work has big sister energy. Not just the photographs of her actual sister and childhood friends that made her an internet legend and ...
item.description:
@petrafcollins’ work has big sister energy. Not just the photographs of her actual sister and childhood friends that made her an internet legend and art world darling, but of the generation of pop divas (Selena Gomez, Olivia Rodrigo, Addison Rae, to name a few).

For the digital cover of i-D and the release of her new book “Star,” Collins trains her lens on her life, opening up to i-D Editor-in-Chief Thom Bettridge about girlhood, horror, and choosing happiness.

See more at the link in bio.

Photography by @petrafcollins @annaballins
Written by @thomthomclub
Fashion Director: @clare_byrne
Hair: @evaniefrausto
Makeup: @alisa_yasuda
Video Director: @brooketjames
DP: @raybee8
Video Editor: @sarahloukiernan
Set Design: @niamhannigan
Production: @perfectprojects_
item.author: petrafcollins

item.title: This Saturday NYC ✨ @climaxbooks !! 2-4pm. Come in Popstar costumes if you want to win a prize! If you already ordered and have your book you are wel...
item.description: This Saturday NYC ✨ @climaxbooks !! 2-4pm. Come in Popstar costumes if you want to win a prize! If you already ordered and have your book you are welcome to come get it signed - books will also be avail. 💓💓💓
item.author: petrafcollins

item.title: STAR is out today!! Purchase wherever books are sold.
item.description:
STAR is out today!! Purchase wherever books are sold.
Thank you to the team that brought this to life I love you so much. ✨✨✨✨

Photo Assistant Hiroki Nagahiro @nagahiroki
Stylist: Daichi Hatsuzawa @d.hatsuzawa

item.title: 🌷 good morning! @nytimes @nytstyle STAR comes out Tuesday ✨
item.description:
🌷 good morning! @nytimes @nytstyle STAR comes out Tuesday ✨

Interview by @lizzydgoodman photographed by @magdawosinskastudio 🌷
item.author: petrafcollins

item.title: Join us at Climax NYC on April 18 to celebrate the launch of @petrafcollins new book STAR 💖✨
item.description:
Join us at Climax NYC on April 18 to celebrate the launch of @petrafcollins new book STAR 💖✨

Fictional popstars and their fans- in tales of love and dangerous obsession. This book is a cinematic journey of the performers as seen through the eyes of their fans and stalkers, images of performances, rescues, and confrontations, interspersed with letters, conversations, and diary entries.

This book is a cinematic journey of the performers as seen through the eyes of their fans and stalkers, images of performances, rescues, and confrontations, interspersed with letters, conversations, and diary entries.

P.S COME DRESSED IN COSTUME 👩‍🎤

Saturday 18th April
2-4pm

Climax NYC
56 East 4th St
New York, NY 10003
item.author: petrafcollins

item.title: In today’s Spyplane @petrafcollins talks about the molecular-level swag of people who know how to dance; why she used to love selfies, and why she wa...
item.description:
In today’s Spyplane @petrafcollins talks about the molecular-level swag of people who know how to dance; why she used to love selfies, and why she was wrong about them; what Wim Wenders taught her about photography; her new book of pictures of fictitious pop stars, their fans and their stalkers; and more.

Only in your inbox and at Blackbird Spyplane.

Portrait by Swan Gallet
item.author: petrafcollins

item.title: THE VINYL ISSUE
item.description:
THE VINYL ISSUE
Photographed by @PetrafCollins.
Cover 1/2.

Questo numero di d è dedicato all’orgoglio analogico nella nostra società digitale.

Editor-in-Chief @EFarneti.

In edicola, eccezionalmente, da domani.

In copertina un’immagine dal progetto “Star” dell’artista e fotografa @PetrafCollins, che qui presenta in anteprima e in uscita il 14 aprile.

#dCover
#dVinylIssue

item.title: @petrafcollins takes you behind the scenes at Miu Miu Fall/Winter 2026 fashion show.
item.description:
@petrafcollins takes you behind the scenes at Miu Miu Fall/Winter 2026 fashion show.
Follow her through the final moments before the runway starts.

Filmed by @gregoireleondufour

#MiuMiuFW26 #MiuMiu

item.title: STAR⭐️ preorder now 🌟
item.description: STAR⭐️ preorder now 🌟
item.author: petrafcollins

item.title: STAR ⭐️ pre-order available now! We shot this like a movie thank you to all that worked on it with me. 💕
item.description:
STAR ⭐️ pre-order available now! We shot this like a movie thank you to all that worked on it with me. 💕

Fictional popstars and their fans- in tales of love and dangerous obsession. This book is a cinematic journey of the performers as seen through the eyes of their fans and stalkers, images of performances, rescues, and confrontations, interspersed with letters, conversations, and diary entries.
item.author: petrafcollins

item.title: 💕fan girl💕 extended to Feb 15! my the first large-scale solo exhibition in Korea. With over 500 works spanning photography, video, installation,...
item.description: 💕fan girl💕 extended to Feb 15! my the first large-scale solo exhibition in Korea. With over 500 works spanning photography, video, installation, fashion, magazines, and archival materials, the exhibition unfolds across three the entire museum. 💕 thank you to all who have visited - I have so enjoyed meeting all of you and it means the world to me.
item.author: petrafcollins
